name: codex-cortex
description: Codex Cortex plugin with a cross-project skill for installing and maintaining project-local continuity state.

interface.shortDescription: Install and maintain Cortex continuity across projects.
interface.longDescription: Codex Cortex gives Codex agents and prompts a central, reusable procedure for installing and maintaining project-local continuity files. It keeps each project's state in that project while the plugin skill provides cross-project install, validation, learning-log, and recovery workflows.
defaultPrompt: Install Codex Cortex in this project.
